response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically broad and experienced individual contributor with a genuine craftsman ethos, but the role demands a Director-level AI strategist with deep, demonstrated AI/ML expertise and customer-advisory experience. His AI work is recent and tooling-level (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows), not the kind of recognized, product-defining AI leadership the role describes. There is no evidence of cloud strategy ownership, advising enterprise customers, or influencing organizational AI direction at scale — the core of this position.
strengths: 15+ years of continuous hands-on engineering across diverse stacks (web, mobile, embedded, cloud, low-latency systems) satisfies the minimum experience threshold
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and a history of building open-source platforms demonstrates builder mentality and self-direction
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks (FOSS4G, TDT) shows some capacity to inspire and educate technical audiences
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — current AI work (MCP generators, agentic tooling) is infrastructure-support level, not the recognized AI product leadership or ML depth the role requires
No evidence of director-level scope: all roles are individual contributor; there is no record of technical strategy ownership, organizational influence, or advising strategic enterprise customers
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud platform ownership experience, both of which are preferred qualifications central to the role's identity
